title: W10 guarded mutation + approval (M-01/M-02): action-fingerprints + single-use approvals + path/argv/env rules + fail-closed + monitored trusted-local mutation

AC1.note: M-01: canonical action-fingerprint (sha256 path/argv/allowlisted-env); checkApproval FAIL-CLOSED (valid ONLY approved+fingerprint-match+not-expired+not-consumed+interactive; single-use/stale/expired/denied/headless→invalid). approval-request/result schema-valid. 38 tests. NO real fs. 17 tests.

AC5.note: tsc clean; full bun test 899/0 (844+55); W3/W8/W5/W6 + src/contracts reused unmodified; deps={}; deterministic no-real-fs; new code under src/harness/mutation/; frozen pkg+src/eval+src/contracts+ADRs untouched. T9 CLEAN core (2 hardening concerns -> W15).
